# Past runs test name display (2026-02-12 06:05Z)

_**User**_

update past runs so that you hide the full test name if it exceeds column width so that the rest of the columns never get affected

        "contents": "export function TestsTabContent({\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName = \"Agent\",\n}: TestsTabContentProps) {\n\n\n      {/* Test Runner Dialog */}\n      &lt;TestRunnerDialog\n        isOpen={testRunnerOpen}\n        onClose={() =&gt; {\n          setTestRunnerOpen(false);\n          setTestsToRun([]);\n        }}\n        agentUuid={agentUuid}\n        agentName={agentName}\n        tests={testsToRun}\n        onRunCreated={handleTestRunCreated}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* Benchmark Dialog */}\n      &lt;BenchmarkDialog\n        isOpen={benchmarkDialogOpen}\n        onClose={() =&gt; setBenchmarkDialogOpen(false)}\n        agentUuid={agentUuid}\n        agentName={agentName}\n        tests={agentTests}\n        onBenchmarkCreated={handleBenchmarkCreated}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* View Past Test Results Dialog */}\n      {selectedPastRun &amp;&amp; selectedPastRun.type === \"llm-unit-test\" &amp;&amp; (\n        &lt;TestRunnerDialog\n          isOpen={viewingTestResults}\n          onClose={() =&gt; {\n            setViewingTestResults(false);\n            setSelectedPastRun(null);\n          }}\n          agentUuid={agentUuid}\n          agentName={agentName}\n          tests={\n            // Convert results to TestData format for in-progress runs\n            selectedPastRun.results?.map((r, i) =&gt; ({\n              uuid: &#96;past-run-test-${i}&#96;,\n              name: r.name || r.test_case?.name || &#96;Test ${i + 1}&#96;,\n              description: \"\",\n              type: \"response\" as const,\n              config: {},\n              created_at: \"\",\n              updated_at: \"\",\n            })) || []\n          }\n          taskId={selectedPastRun.uuid}\n          initialRunStatus={selectedPastRun.status}\n          onStatusUpdate={handleRunStatusUpdate}\n        /&gt;\n      )}\n\n      {/* View Past Benchmark Results Dialog */}\n      {selectedPastRun &amp;&amp; selectedPastRun.type === \"llm-benchmark\" &amp;&amp; (\n        &lt;BenchmarkResultsDialog\n          isOpen={viewingBenchmarkResults}\n}",

        "contents": "export default function LLMPage() {\n\n        ) : (\n          &lt;&gt;\n            {/* Desktop Table View */}\n            &lt;div className=\"hidden md:block border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden\"&gt;\n              {/* Table Header */}\n              &lt;div className=\"grid grid-cols-[1fr_1fr_auto] gap-4 px-4 py-2 border-b border-border bg-muted/30\"&gt;\n                &lt;div className=\"text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground\"&gt;\n                  Name\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n                &lt;div className=\"text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground\"&gt;\n                  Type\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n                &lt;div className=\"w-16\"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;\n              &lt;/div&gt;\n              {/* Table Rows */}\n              {filteredTests.map((test) =&gt; (\n                &lt;div\n                  key={test.uuid}\n                  onClick={() =&gt; openEditTest(test.uuid)}\n                  className=\"grid grid-cols-[1fr_1fr_auto] gap-4 px-4 py-2 border-b border-border last:border-b-0 hover:bg-muted/20 transition-colors cursor-pointer items-center\"\n                &gt;\n                  &lt;div className=\"min-w-0\"&gt;\n                    &lt;p className=\"text-sm font-medium text-foreground truncate\"&gt;\n                      {test.name}\n                    &lt;/p&gt;\n                  &lt;/div&gt;\n                  &lt;p className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"&gt;\n                    {test.type === \"response\"\n                      ? \"Next Reply\"\n                      : test.type === \"tool_call\"\n                      ? \"Tool Call\"\n                      : \"—\"}\n                  &lt;/p&gt;\n                  &lt;div className=\"flex items-center gap-1\"&gt;\n                    {/* Play Button */}\n                    &lt;button\n              )\n}",

        "contents": "export function BenchmarkResultsDialog({\n  isOpen,\n  onClose,\n  onGoBack,\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName,\n  testUuids,\n  testNames,\n  models,\n  taskId,\n  onBenchmarkCreated,\n}: BenchmarkResultsDialogProps) {\n}\n\n                {/* Empty State */}\n                {(!leaderboardSummary || leaderboardSummary.length === 0) &amp;&amp; (\n                  &lt;div className=\"text-center py-12\"&gt;\n                    &lt;p className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"&gt;\n                      No leaderboard data available\n                    &lt;/p&gt;\n                  &lt;/div&gt;\n                )}\n              &lt;/div&gt;\n            )}\n\n            {/* Outputs Tab - Show during progress and when outputs tab is active when done */}\n            {(!isDone || activeTab === \"outputs\") &amp;&amp; (\n              &lt;div className=\"flex h-full overflow-hidden\"&gt;\n                {/* Left Panel - Provider Toggles with Tests */}\n                &lt;div\n                  className={&#96;w-full md:w-80 border-r border-border flex flex-col overflow-hidden ${\n                    selectedTest ? \"hidden md:flex\" : \"flex\"\n                  }&#96;}\n                &gt;\n                  &lt;div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto\"&gt;\n                    {providersToDisplay.length &gt; 0 ? (\n                      providersToDisplay.map((modelResult) =&gt; (\n                        &lt;ProviderSection\n                          key={modelResult.model}\n                          modelResult={modelResult}\n                          isExpanded={expandedProviders.has(modelResult.model)}\n                          onToggle={() =&gt; toggleProvider(modelResult.model)}\n                          selectedTest={selectedTest}\n                          onTestSelect={(testIndex) =&gt;\n                            handleTestSelect(modelResult.model, testIndex)\n                          }\n                          testNames={testNames}\n                        /&gt;\n                      ))\n                    ) : (\n                      &lt;div className=\"p-4 text-sm text-muted-foreground\"&gt;\n                        Waiting for results...\n                      &lt;/div&gt;\n                    )}\n                  &lt;/div&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n\n                {/* Right Panel - Test Details */}\n                &lt;div\n                  className=\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/BenchmarkResultsDialog.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "function ProviderSection({\n  modelResult,\n  isExpanded,\n  onToggle,\n  selectedTest,\n  onTestSelect,\n  testNames,\n}: {\n  modelResult: ModelResult;\n  isExpanded: boolean;\n  onToggle: () =&gt; void;\n  selectedTest: { model: string; testIndex: number } | null;\n  onTestSelect: (testIndex: number) =&gt; void;\n  testNames: string[];\n}) {\n() =&gt; {\n((_, index) =&gt; {\n                  const testResult = modelResult.test_results?.[index];\n                  const hasResult = !!testResult;\n                  const isSelected =\n                    selectedTest?.model === modelResult.model &amp;&amp;\n                    selectedTest?.testIndex === index;\n\n                  // Get test name from result, or fall back to testNames array\n                  const testName = hasResult\n                    ? testResult.name ||\n                      testResult.test_case?.name ||\n                      testNames[index] ||\n                      &#96;Test ${index + 1}&#96;\n                    : testNames[index] || &#96;Test ${index + 1}&#96;;\n\n                  // Determine status: if we have a result use it, otherwise show as running\n                  const status = hasResult\n                    ? testResult.passed === null\n                      ? \"running\"\n                      : testResult.passed\n                      ? \"passed\"\n                      : \"failed\"\n                    : \"running\";\n\n                  // Only make clickable if we have a result\n                  if (hasResult) {\n                    return (\n                      &lt;button\n                        key={index}\n                        type=\"button\"\n                        onClick={() =&gt; onTestSelect(index)}\n                        className={&#96;w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg cursor-pointer transition-colors ${\n                          isSelected ? \"bg-muted\" : \"hover:bg-muted/50\"\n                        }&#96;}\n                      &gt;\n                        &lt;StatusIcon\n                          status={status as \"running\" | \"passed\" | \"failed\"}\n                        /&gt;\n                        &lt;span className=\"text-sm text-foreground truncate\"&gt;\n                          {testName}\n                        &lt;/span&gt;\n                      &lt;/button&gt;\n                    );\n                  }\n\n                  // No result yet - show as running placeholder (not clickable)\n                }\n          }\n}",

when dialogs are open\n  useHideFloatingButton(deleteDialogOpen);\n  useHideFloatingButton(testRunnerOpen);\n  useHideFloatingButton(benchmarkDialogOpen);\n         "contents": "export function SimulationRunsTab({ simulationUuid }: SimulationRunsTabProps) {\n\n\n      {/* Desktop Table View */}\n      &lt;div className=\"hidden md:block border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden\"&gt;\n        {/* Table Header */}\n        &lt;div className=\"grid grid-cols-[1fr_1fr_1fr_1fr] gap-4 px-4 py-2 border-b border-border bg-muted/30\"&gt;\n          &lt;div className=\"text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground\"&gt;Name&lt;/div&gt;\n          &lt;div className=\"text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground\"&gt;\n            Status\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n          &lt;div className=\"text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground\"&gt;Type&lt;/div&gt;\n          &lt;div className=\"text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground\"&gt;\n            &lt;button\n              onClick={toggleSort}\n              className=\"flex items-center gap-2 hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n            &gt;\n              Created At\n              &lt;svg\n                className={&#96;w-4 h-4 transition-transform ${\n                  sortOrder === \"asc\" ? \"rotate-180\" : \"\"\n                }&#96;}\n                fill=\"none\"\n                viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n                stroke=\"currentColor\"\n                strokeWidth={2}\n              &gt;\n                &lt;path\n                  strokeLinecap=\"round\"\n                  strokeLinejoin=\"round\"\n                  d=\"M19.5 13.5L12 21m0 0l-7.5-7.5M12 21V3\"\n                /&gt;\n              &lt;/svg&gt;\n            &lt;/button&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n        {/* Table Rows */}\n        {sortedRuns.map((run) =&gt; (\n          &lt;Link\n            key={run.uuid}\n        )\n}",

        "contents": "export function TestRunnerDialog({\n  isOpen,\n  onClose,\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName,\n  tests,\n  taskId,\n  onRunCreated,\n  initialRunStatus,\n  onStatusUpdate,\n}: TestRunnerDialogProps) {\n\n\n              {/* Passed Tests */}\n              {passedTests.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (\n                &lt;div className=\"p-4\"&gt;\n                  &lt;h3 className=\"text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground mb-2 flex items-center gap-2\"&gt;\n                    &lt;div className=\"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-green-500\"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;\n                    Passed ({passedTests.length})\n                  &lt;/h3&gt;\n                  &lt;div className=\"space-y-1\"&gt;\n                    {passedTests.map((result) =&gt;         "contents": "export function TestRunnerDialog({\n  isOpen,\n  onClose,\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName,\n  tests,\n  taskId,\n  onRunCreated,\n  initialRunStatus,\n  onStatusUpdate,\n}: TestRunnerDialogProps) {\n (\n        /* Content - Split panel */\n        &lt;div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden\"&gt;\n          {/* Left Panel - Test List */}\n          &lt;div\n            className={&#96;w-full md:w-80 border-r border-border flex flex-col overflow-hidden ${\n              selectedTestUuid ? \"hidden md:flex\" : \"flex\"\n            }&#96;}\n          &gt;\n            &lt;div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto\"&gt;\n              {/* Failed Tests - Always shown first */}\n              {failedTests.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (\n                &lt;div className=\"p-4\"&gt;\n                  &lt;h3 className=\"text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground mb-2 flex items-center gap-2\"&gt;\n                    &lt;div className=\"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-red-500\"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;\n                    Failed ({failedTests.length})\n                  &lt;/h3&gt;\n                  &lt;div className=\"space-y-1\"&gt;\n                    {failedTests.map((result) =&gt; (\n                      &lt;TestListItem\n                        key={result.test.uuid}\n                        result={result}\n                        isSelected={selectedTestUuid === result.test.uuid}\n                        onSelect={() =&gt; setSelectedTestUuid(result.test.uuid)}\n                      /&gt;\n                    ))}\n                  &lt;/div&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n              )}\n\n              {/* Passed Tests */}\n              {passedTests.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (\n                &lt;div className=\"p-4\"&gt;\n}",

        "contents": "export function TestsTabContent({\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName = \"Agent\",\n}: TestsTabContentProps) {\n\n\n  // Handle when a new test run is created\n  const handleTestRunCreated = (taskId: string, testCount?: number) =&gt; {\n    const count = testCount ?? testsToRun.length;\n    // Create optimistic results array with test names for display\n    const optimisticResults: TestRunResult[] = testsToRun.map((test) =&gt; ({\n      name: test.name,\n      passed: null,\n      test_case: {\n        name: test.name,\n      },\n    }));\n    const newRun: TestRun = {\n      uuid: taskId,\n      name: \"\",\n      status: \"pending\",\n      type: \"llm-unit-test\",\n      updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n      total_tests: count,\n      passed: null,\n      failed: null,\n      results: optimisticResults,\n    };\n    setPastRuns((prev) =&gt; [newRun, ...prev]);\n    // Polling is handled by the useEffect that watches pastRuns for pending items\n  };\n\n  // Handle when a new benchmark is created\n  const handleBenchmarkCreated = (taskId: string) =&gt; {\n    const newRun: TestRun = {\n      uuid: taskId,\n      name: \"Benchmark\",\n      status: \"pending\",\n      type: \"llm-benchmark\",\n      updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n      total_tests: null,\n      passed: null,\n      failed: null,\n      model_results: [],\n    };\n    setPastRuns((prev) =&gt; [newRun, ...prev]);\n    // Polling is handled by the useEffect that watches pastRuns for pending items\n  };\n\n  // Callback when a run completes from the TestRunnerDialog\n  const handleRunStatusUpdate = useCallback(\n    (\n      taskId: string,\n      status: string,\n      results?: TestRunResult[],\n      passed?: number | null,\n      failed?: number | null\n    ) =&gt; {\n      setPastRuns((prev) =&gt;\n        prev.map((run) =&gt; {\n          if (run.uuid !== taskId) return run;\n          return {\n            ...run,\n            status,\n            results: results ?? run.results,\n            passed: passed ?? run.passed,\n            failed: failed ?? run.failed,\n            updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n          };\n        })\n      );\n    },\n    []\n  );\n\n  // Remove test from agent\n  const handleRemoveTest = async ()\n;\n}",

        "contents": "export function TestsTabContent({\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName = \"Agent\",\n}: TestsTabContentProps) {\n\n [showTestDropdown]);\n\n  // Fetch past test runs\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    const fetchPastRuns = async () =&gt; {\n      if (!backendAccessToken) return;\n\n      try {\n        setPastRunsLoading(true);\n        const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n        if (!backendUrl) {\n          throw new Error(\"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\");\n        }\n\n        const response = await fetch(\n          &#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tests/agent/${agentUuid}/runs&#96;,\n          {\n            method: \"GET\",\n            headers: {\n              accept: \"application/json\",\n              \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n              Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n            },\n          }\n        );\n\n        if (response.status === 401) {\n          await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n          return;\n        }\n\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          // Silently handle errors for past runs - it's not critical\n          console.error(\"Failed to fetch past runs\");\n          return;\n        }\n\n        const data = await response.json();\n        setPastRuns(data.runs || []);\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching past runs:\", err);\n      } finally {\n        setPastRunsLoading(false);\n      }\n    };\n\n    if (agentUuid &amp;&amp; backendAccessToken) {\n      fetchPastRuns();\n    }\n  }, [agentUuid, backendAccessToken]);\n\n  // Poll pending runs (excluding the one being viewed in dialog)\n}",

!error &amp;&amp; (\n          &lt;div className=\"flex-1 overflow-hidden\"&gt;\n            {/* Leaderboard Tab - Only when done */}\n            {isDone &amp;&amp; activeTab === \"leaderboard\" &amp;&amp; 0 &amp;&amp; (\n                  &lt;DownloadableTable\n                    columns={[\n                      {\n                        key: \"model\",\n                        header: \"Model\",\n                        render: (value) =&gt; &#96;${value.toFixed(1)}%&#96;}\n                    colorMap={colorMap}\n                  /&gt;\n                )}\n\n                {/* Empty State */}\n                {(!leaderboardSummary || leaderboardSummary.length === 0) &amp;&amp; (\n                  &lt;div className=\"text-center py-12\"&gt;\n}",

        "contents": "// Local Test Detail View Component with error/pending/running state handling\nfunction LocalTestDetailView({ result }: { result: TestResult }) {\n  if (result.status === \"pending\") {\n    return (\n      &lt;div className=\"flex items-center justify-center h-full\"&gt;\n        &lt;p className=\"text-muted-foreground\"&gt;Test is pending&lt;/p&gt;\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (result.status === \"queued\") {\n    return (\n      &lt;div className=\"flex items-center justify-center h-full\"&gt;\n        &lt;p className=\"text-muted-foreground\"&gt;Test is queued&lt;/p&gt;\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (result.status === \"running\") {\n    return (\n      &lt;div className=\"flex items-center justify-center h-full\"&gt;\n        &lt;div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"&gt;\n          &lt;SpinnerIcon className=\"w-5 h-5 animate-spin text-muted-foreground\" /&gt;\n          &lt;p className=\"text-muted-foreground\"&gt;Running test...&lt;/p&gt;\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return (\n      &lt;div className=\"p-4 md:p-6\"&gt;\n        &lt;div className=\"bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/30 rounded-lg p-4\"&gt;\n          &lt;div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-2\"&gt;\n            &lt;svg\n              className=\"w-5 h-5 text-red-500\"\n              fill=\"none\"\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n            &gt;\n              &lt;path\n                strokeLinecap=\"round\"\n                strokeLinejoin=\"round\"\n                d=\"M12 9v3.75m9-.75a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0zm-9 3.75h.008v.008H12v-.008z\"\n              /&gt;\n            &lt;/svg&gt;\n            &lt;span className=\"font-medium text-red-500\"&gt;Something went wrong&lt;/span&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n          &lt;p className=\"text-sm text-red-400\"&gt;\n            We&amp;apos;re looking into it. Please reach out to us if this issue persists.\n          &lt;/p&gt;\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Use shared component for main content\n  return (\n    &lt;SharedTestDetailView\n      history={result.testCase?.history || []}\n      output={result.output}\n      passed={result.evaluation?.passed ?? false}\n    /&gt;\n  );\n}",

        "contents": "export function TestRunnerDialog({\n  isOpen,\n  onClose,\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName,\n  tests,\n  taskId,\n  onRunCreated,\n  initialRunStatus,\n  onStatusUpdate,\n}: TestRunnerDialogProps) {\n\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 p-0 md:p-4\"&gt;\n      &lt;div className=\"bg-background rounded-none md:rounded-xl w-full max-w-5xl h-full md:h-[80vh] flex flex-col shadow-2xl\"&gt;\n        {/* Header */}\n        &lt;div className=\"flex items-center justify-between px-4 md:px-6 py-3 md:py-4 border-b border-border\"&gt;\n          &lt;h2 className=\"text-base md:text-lg font-semibold text-foreground\"&gt;\n            Test Status for {agentName}\n          &lt;/h2&gt;\n          &lt;div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"&gt;\n            {/* Passed/Failed counts - desktop only */}\n            {!isOverallError &amp;&amp;\n              testResults.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp;\n              (passedTests.length &gt; 0 || failedTests.length &gt; 0) &amp;&amp; (\n                &lt;div className=\"hidden md:block\"&gt;\n                  &lt;TestStats\n                    passedCount={passedTests.length}\n                    failedCount={failedTests.length}\n                  /&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n              )}\n            &lt;button\n              onClick={onClose}\n              className=\"flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n            &gt;\n              &lt;CloseIcon className=\"w-5 h-5\" /&gt;\n            &lt;/button&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n\n        {/* Overall Error State - replaces split panel */}\n        {isOverallError ? (\n          &lt;div\n}",
        "signatures": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/agent-tabs/TestsTabContent.tsx",
        "range": {

          }
        },
        "contents": "export function TestsTabContent({\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName = \"Agent\",\n}: TestsTabContentProps) {\n() =&gt; {\nconst pollPendingRuns = async \n\n\n      for (const run of pendingRuns) {\n        // Double-check if this run is now being viewed in dialog\n        if (\n          (viewingTestResultsRef.current ||\n            viewingBenchmarkResultsRef.current) &amp;&amp;\n          selectedPastRunRef.current?.uuid === run.uuid\n        ) {\n          continue;\n        }\n\n        try {\n          const endpoint =\n            run.type === \"llm-unit-test\"\n              ? &#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tests/run/${run.uuid}&#96;\n              : &#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tests/benchmark/${run.uuid}&#96;;\n\n          const response = await fetch(endpoint, {\n            method: \"GET\",\n            headers: {\n              accept: \"application/json\",\n              \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n              Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n            },\n          });\n\n          if (!response.ok) continue;\n\n          const result = await response.json();\n\n          // Update the run in pastRuns\n          setPastRuns((prev) =&gt;\n            prev.map((r) =&gt; {\n              if (r.uuid !== run.uuid) return r;\n\n              if (run.type === \"llm-unit-test\") {\n                return {\n                  ...r,\n                  status: result.status,\n                  total_tests: result.total_tests ?? r.total_tests,\n                  passed: result.passed ?? r.passed,\n                  failed: result.failed ?? r.failed,\n                  results: result.results ?? r.results,\n                  updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n                };\n              } else {\n                return {\n                  ...r,\n                  status: result.status,\n                  model_results: result.model_results ?? r.model_results,\n                  updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n                };\n              }\n            })\n          );\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error(&#96;Error polling run ${run.uuid}:&#96;, err);\n          // Mark this specific run as failed\n;\n  }\n\n}",

            "text": "              : &#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tests/benchmark/${run.uuid}&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 407
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408
          },
          {
            "text": "          const response = await fetch(endpoint, {",
            "lineNumber": 409
          },
          {
            "text": "            method: \"GET\",",
            "lineNumber": 410
          },
          {
            "text": "            headers: {",
            "lineNumber": 411
          },
          {
            "text": "              accept: \"application/json\",",
            "lineNumber": 412
          },
          {
            "text": "              \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",",
            "lineNumber": 413
          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 416
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "text": "          if (!response.ok) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 418
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419
          },
          {
            "text": "          const result = await response.json();",
            "lineNumber": 420
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421
          },
          {
            "text": "          // Update the run in pastRuns",
            "lineNumber": 422
          },
          {
            "text": "          setPastRuns((prev) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 423
          },
          {
            "text": "            prev.map((r) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 424
          },
          {
            "text": "              if (r.uuid !== run.uuid) return r;",
            "lineNumber": 425
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426
          },
          {
            "text": "              if (run.type === \"llm-unit-test\") {",
            "lineNumber": 427
          },
          {
            "text": "                return {",
            "lineNumber": 428
          },
          {
            "text": "                  ...r,",
            "lineNumber": 429
          },
          {
            "text": "                  status: result.status,",
            "lineNumber": 430
          },
          {
            "text": "                  total_tests: result.total_tests ?? r.total_tests,",
            "lineNumber": 431
          },
          {
            "text": "                  passed: result.passed ?? r.passed,",
            "lineNumber": 432
          },
          {
            "text": "                  failed: result.failed ?? r.failed,",
            "lineNumber": 433
          },
          {
            "text": "                  results: result.results ?? r.results,",
            "lineNumber": 434
          },
          {
            "text": "                  updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),",
            "lineNumber": 435
          },
          {
            "text": "                };",
            "lineNumber": 436
          },
          {
            "text": "              } else {",
            "lineNumber": 437
          },
          {
            "text": "                return {",
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {
            "text": "                  ...r,",
            "lineNumber": 439
          },
          {
            "text": "                  status: result.status,",
            "lineNumber": 440
          },
          {
            "text": "                  model_results: result.model_results ?? r.model_results,",
            "lineNumber": 441
          },
          {
            "text": "                  updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),",
            "lineNumber": 442
          },
          {
            "text": "                };",
            "lineNumber": 443
          },
          {
            "text": "              }",
            "lineNumber": 444
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 445
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 446
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 447
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function SimulationRunsTab({ simulationUuid }: SimulationRunsTabProps) {\n\n        {/* Table Rows */}\n        {sortedRuns.map((run) =&gt; (\n          &lt;Link\n            key={run.uuid}\n            href={&#96;/simulations/${simulationUuid}/runs/${run.uuid}&#96;}\n            className=\"grid grid-cols-[1fr_1fr_1fr_1fr] gap-4 px-4 py-2 border-b border-border last:border-b-0 hover:bg-muted/20 transition-colors items-center\"\n          &gt;\n            &lt;div className=\"min-w-0\"&gt;\n              &lt;p className=\"text-sm font-medium text-foreground truncate\"&gt;\n                {run.name}\n              &lt;/p&gt;\n            &lt;/div&gt;\n            &lt;div&gt;\n              &lt;span\n                className={&#96;inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium ${getStatusBadgeClass(\n                  run.status\n                )}&#96;}\n              &gt;\n                {formatStatus(run.status)}\n              &lt;/span&gt;\n            &lt;/div&gt;\n            &lt;div&gt;\n              &lt;span\n                className={&#96;inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium ${getTypeBadgeClass(\n                  run.type\n                )}&#96;}\n              &gt;\n                {run.type}\n              &lt;/span&gt;\n            &lt;/div&gt;\n            &lt;p className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"&gt;\n              {formatDate(run.created_at || run.updated_at || \"\")}\n            &lt;/p&gt;\n          &lt;/Link&gt;\n        ))}\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n\n      {/* Mobile Card View */}\n      &lt;div className=\"md:hidden space-y-4\"&gt;\n        {sortedRuns.map((run) =&gt; (\n          &lt;Link\n            key={run.uuid}\n        )\n}",

I found the "Past runs" section in `TestsTabContent.tsx`. Let me read the full context around the Past runs rendering code to understand the current implementation better.

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="read_file_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **read_file_v2** • Read file: /Users/aman/Documents/repos/artpark/pense-frontend/src/components/agent-tabs/TestsTabContent.tsx</summary>

</details>
</tool-use>

---

Now I can see the issue. The problem is that the first column with the test name uses `1fr` which allows it to grow infinitely, pushing other columns. The `truncate` class is applied to the span, but the parent container doesn't have proper constraints. I need to:

1. Add `min-w-0` to the first column container to allow truncation to work properly in a grid context
2. Make sure the text truncates properly

Let me make the fix:

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2** • Edit file: /Users/aman/Documents/repos/artpark/pense-frontend/src/components/agent-tabs/TestsTabContent.tsx</summary>

</details>

</tool-use>

---

The changes I made:

1. Changed `sm:grid-cols-[1fr_auto_auto_auto]` to `sm:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_auto_auto_auto]` - This allows the first column to shrink below its content size, which is necessary for truncation to work in CSS Grid.

2. Added `min-w-0` to the parent div of the test name - This ensures the container can shrink below the minimum content width.

3. Added `block` to the span with `truncate` - This ensures the truncation works properly since `truncate` requires a block-level element.

These changes ensure that when the test name is too long, it will be truncated with an ellipsis (...) instead of pushing the other columns (Type badge, Time, Status) off to the right.
